title_en: IGN Summer of Gaming 2026: How to Watch and What to Expect From Streams Like IGN Live, Xbox Games Showcase, and More
summary_en: IGN’s Summer of Gaming is back, and this guide will let you know how you can watch all the biggest streams right along with us, from our very own IGN Live to the Xbox Games Showcase, State of Play, Summer Game Fest Watch Party, Wholesome Direct, and more.
body_en:
IGN’s Summer of Gaming is back for its seventh year, and there are so many big moments to look forward to that promise to give us an exciting glimpse of the future of video games, from our very own IGN Live to the Xbox Games Showcase, State of Play, Summer Game Fest Watch Party, Wholesome Direct, and more.
There is so much going on that we wanted to create this guide to ensure you won’t miss a thing, and we’ll be updating this as more events are announced and revealed!
If you’d like to watch all these big showcases we’ll detail below along with us, here are all the platforms you can do so from the comfort of your very own home;
Yes! IGN Live is set to take place both in-person at the Magic Box @ The Reef in Downtown LA and online on June 6-7. While we’d love to have you join us in person, we’ll also be streaming the biggest moments from both days of IGN Live. To learn more, check out how you can get tickets to the live event, the schedule, the guest lineup and celebrity appearances planned, and how you can watch the festivities from the comfort of your home.
You can find the current schedule for IGN’s Summer of Gaming below, but we do want to note that this list will be updated regularly with new shows, details, dates, and more!
